name: Electric Road
short_description: 『Electric Road』 is a puzzle game where you transmit electricity from a power plant to a factory using tiles within a limited budget. How you connect will affect your costs, and your choices will directly affect your results. Design your own optimized power grid with challenges, and smartness.
detailed_description:
🟨 About This Game

『Electric Road』 is a strategy puzzle game where you transmit electricity from a power plant to a factory using tiles within a limited budget.
How you connect will affect your costs, and your choices will directly affect your results.
Design your own optimized power grid with challenges, efficiency, and smartness.

🔶 Game Features (Key Features)

  • A simple yet deep puzzle. The fun of finding the optimal solution through simple manipulation of connecting wires! The entire path changes depending on where you place the tiles.

  • Budget Optimization & 3-Star System Get more stars by solving problems with less! Supports multi-repeat content with repeated challenges to find the lowest cost.

  • The Art of Strategic DeploymentAvoid obstacles, think about connection directions, and find the best solution with limited resources.

🧩 Who would you recommend this to?

  • Puzzle fans who love logical thinking

  • Gamers who like strategy elements like budgeting and optimization.

  • Light users who prefer short, focused gameplay.
